parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();

const results = items.map(item => {
  const j = item.json || {};
  return {
    platform: j.platform || '',
    input_mode: j.input_mode || '',
    source_key: j.source_key || '',
    post_url: j.post_url || '',
    author_name: j.author_name || '',
    author_profile_url: j.author_profile_url || '',
    text: j.text || '',
    published_at: j.published_at || '',
    like_count: j.like_count || 0,
    comment_count: j.comment_count || 0,
    share_count: j.share_count || 0,
    collect_count: j.collect_count || 0,
    play_count: j.play_count || 0,
    fans_count: j.fans_count || 0,
    video_url: j.video_url || '',
    image_urls: j.image_urls || [],
    cover_url: j.cover_url || '',
    page_name: j.page_name || '',
    post_id: j.post_id || '',
    display_url: j.display_url || '',
    author_username: j.author_username || '',
    shortcode: j.shortcode || '',
    media_type: j.media_type || '',
    author_signature: j.author_signature || '',
    script_text: j.script_text || '',
    raw: j.raw || {}
  };
});

return [{
  json: {
    success: true,
    ok: true,
    task_id: $('标准化输入').first().json.task_id,
    platform: $('标准化输入').first().json.platform,
    input_mode: $('标准化输入').first().json.input_mode,
    status: 'completed',
    workflow_id: $('标准化输入').first().json.workflow_id,
    task_count: $('标准化输入').first().json.taskCount,
    success_count: results.length,
    failed_count: Math.max(0, $('标准化输入').first().json.taskCount - results.length),
    results,
    callback_time: new Date().toISOString()
  }
}];

parameters.name: reason
parameters.value: =Social采集总工作流-{{ $('标准化输入').first().json.platform }}-{{ $('标准化输入').first().json.input_mode }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{{ success: true, ok: true, task_id: $('标准化输入').first().json.task_id, platform: $('标准化输入').first().json.platform, input_mode: $('标准化输入').first().json.input_mode, status: 'completed', workflow_id: $('标准化输入').first().json.workflow_id, task_count: $('标准化输入').first().json.taskCount, success_count: 0, failed_count: $('标准化输入').first().json.taskCount, results: [], message: '采集完成，但没有有效数据', callback_time: new Date().toISOString() }}}
